summary:
The tests all passed, so the issue is resolved. The problem was a port mismatch between the nginx reverse proxy and the Flask application. Nginx was configured to forward requests to port 5001, while the Flask application was listening on port 5000. I corrected the nginx configuration to forward requests to port 5000, which resolved the issue.
